case_title: MICHAEL L. DWORKIN VS. JAMES D.F. RICKETTS et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF MICHAEL L. DWORKIN IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY CLERK FILED BY PLAINTIFF DWORKIN, MICHAEL L.
